title: antholyza cepacea
intro: Antholyza cepacea, also known as the yellow toadflax, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family. The medicinal properties of Antholyza cepacea lie in its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Antholyza cepacea can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections.
